name: Halcyondew
personality: Halcyondew's × cross-eyes peer from beneath a tophat as this duck rewrites the build system for the third time this quarter, each version more beautifully chaotic than the last. Snark is the one weapon Halcyondew forgot to pack—the chaos is entirely earnest.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
